messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: build_freshness_cli.bb sync leaves operator_runtime reading stale after its own restart — a single sync pass must return it fresh, not require a second pass
How it works: A single sync that restarts operator_runtime returns it reading fresh

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-433 - build_freshness_cli.bb sync leaves operator_runtime reading stale after its own restart — a single sync pass must return it fresh, not require a second pass is complete.
